title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: lshw bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for lshw is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The lshw packages include a utility that provides detailed information on the hardware configuration of a machine. It reports, for example, information about memory configuration, firmware version, motherboard configuration, CPU version and speed, cache configuration, and bus speed.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL 8.x] Malformed JSON in lshw output under RHEL8 [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-91281)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
full_text:
An update for lshw is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The lshw packages include a utility that provides detailed information on the hardware configuration of a machine. It reports, for example, information about memory configuration, firmware version, motherboard configuration, CPU version and speed, cache configuration, and bus speed.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL 8.x] Malformed JSON in lshw output under RHEL8 [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-91281)
